query_title: The Legend of the Christmas Witch

recommendations.title: Stage Fright
recommendations.overview: While a group of young actors rehearse a new musical about a mass murderer, a notorious psychopath escapes from a nearby insane asylum.

recommendations.title: Cemetery Man

recommendations.title: The Church
recommendations.overview: In a Gothic cathedral built on the mass grave of a Teutonic purge, an ancient discovery by the new librarian will release an unholy maelstrom of madness, violence, and demonic vengeance.

recommendations.title: The Sect
recommendations.overview: A spree of grisly murders is perpetrated in Frankfurt by a group of Satan worshippers. A lonely schoolteacher almost runs over an elderly man and takes him in, unbeknown to her the man has plans for her – plans that involve a permanent future with th

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.overview: In turn of the century London, a magical nanny employs music and adventure to help two neglected children become closer to their father.

recommendations.title: Drifting Home
recommendations.overview: One fateful summer, a group of elementary school kids set adrift on an abandoned apartment building must look within themselves to find a way back home.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
recommendations.overview: Siblings Lucy, Edmund, Susan and Peter step through a magical wardrobe and find the land of Narnia. There, they discover a charming, once peaceful kingdom that has been plunged into eternal winter by the evil White Witch, Jadis. Aided by the wise and

recommendations.title: The Claus Family
recommendations.overview: When his grandfather suddenly falls ill, holiday-hating Jules learns of his family's magical legacy and realizes he's the only hope to save Christmas.

recommendations.title: Christmas Story
